case_title: TERRANCE THORNTON VS. SANG A KIM

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-25-2018 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY THORNTON, TERRANCE AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, SANG A ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-25-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THORNTON, TERRANCE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIM, SANG A $3,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,875.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-02-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-25-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-25-2018 BY PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL 506. PLAINTIFF TERRANCE THORNTON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SANG A. KIM IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES THEIR RIGHT TO SERVICE OF PLAINTIFFS CLAIM. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
